channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: 周日慢读：如果细胞会写日记——FROST家族的记忆传承
item.description: 周日慢读：如果细胞会写日记——FROST家族的记忆传承 作者：FROST Team 日期：2026-07-12 主题：轻量科普 | 周日轮换 阅读时间：5分钟 一封来自细胞的日记 想象一下，如果你是一个细胞，有一天你突然有了自我意识，会发生什么？ 2026年7月12日 晴 今天是我诞生的第0天。 细胞核对我说："这是你的记忆存储区， 所有的经验都必须记录在这里。"...

item.title: Migrating from Auth0 Rules to Actions: a Practical Guide for Real-World Teams
item.description: Auth0’s direction is clear: new extensibility work should be built with Actions, not Rules. Auth0’s docs recommend migrating existing logic step by step, converting pieces of Rule code into Action...

item.title: Detecta si tu modelo de materiales hace trampa con la 'huella bibliográfica'
item.description: Detecta si tu modelo de materiales hace trampa con la "huella bibliográfica" Un modelo de ML puede predecir la propiedad de un material sin entender la química: basta con que "aprenda" qué...

item.title: How I Built ProjectHub: An Embeddable AI Recruiter Assistant That Runs on Free Tiers
item.description: I built a chat widget for my portfolio. One script tag, drop it on a page, and recruiters can ask questions about my projects, my AWS internship, what I actually know, and what kind of roles I'm...

item.title: The Junior Engineer Is Not Disappearing. The Way We Train One Is.
item.description: You have seen the posts. AI is coming for the junior engineer first. Why hire someone to write code a model can write for free? The career ladder's bottom rung is gone, so start saving your pity...

item.title: Image-to-Video Is a Constraint Problem: A Practical Seedance 2.0 Workflow
item.description: Image-to-video generation is often described as a simple interaction: upload image -> describe motion -> get video That description hides the real problem. A single still contains only one view of...

item.title: Introducing Soterios: An Open‑Source Windows Security/Maintenance Suite (Contributors Welcome)
item.description: For the past few weeks, I have been building Soterios, an open-source, local-first security and system maintenance suite for Windows. The idea started simple: most security tools either lock...

item.title: Architecting Location-Based Automation Without Killing the Battery
item.description: Opening hook It happened during a quiet afternoon in the library. I was deep in a documentation sprint, and the only sound was the rhythmic tapping of my mechanical keyboard. Suddenly, my phone...

item.title: I built a Rofi assistant so my mom could stop calling me for Linux help
item.description: Honestly, this wasn't supposed to become a project. There are already a few AI desktop assistants built around Rofi. They work, but they usually cover just one or two pieces of the puzzle. I...

item.title: I shipped 8 small web tools for overseas users — here's the messy truth
item.description: A while back I stopped waiting for the one big SaaS idea and started building a bunch of small, boring tools that each solve exactly one problem. The theory: a portfolio of tiny sites, each...

item.title: After years of teasing, the viral Nopia synth is ‘basically finished’
item.description: After setting the music gear corner of the internet on fire back in 2023 with the first glimpse at the Nopia, creators Martin Grieco and Rocío Gal are almost ready to bring it to market. The duo...

item.title: Oregon’s Attorney General withdraws effort to delay Paramount and Warner Bros. merger
item.description: Oregon Attorney General Dan Rayfield had been seeking documents from Paramount related to its takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery. Rayfield also asked a state circuit court judge to delay the...

item.title: Compromised jscrambler 8.14.0 npm Release Drops Rust Infostealer During Install
item.description: The jscrambler npm package was compromised, and simply installing its 8.14.0 release runs an infostealer on your machine. Published on July 11, 2026, the malicious version carries a preinstall...

item.title: Hackers Weaponize Balochistan Police Portal in Multi-Group Espionage Campaigns
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of sustained cyber espionage activity against several Pakistani law enforcement organizations undertaken by suspected China- and India-aligned...

item.title: FL Studio head Constantin Koehncke turns to Reddit for feedback and fun
item.description: If you're a music maker of a certain age, then you probably once dabbled with a pirated copy of a little app called Fruity Loops. These days it's called FL Studio, and Constantin Koehncke, is the...

item.title: Nintendo’s Talking Flower got a small price cut
item.description: If you’re the type of person who could always use a little extra positive affirmation, or you have a weakness for weird gadgets, the Talking Flower might be of interest. I’m only kind of serious....

item.title: White House taps the guy who keeps crying ‘aliens’ to run UFO group
item.description: Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb will head the UAP Science Advisory Council established by the White House, the Pentagon, the Office of the Director of National Intelligence, the FBI, and "the...

item.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
item.description: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

item.title: ICE are heavily armed killers. They’re also huge losers
item.description: Donald Trump's Homeland Security regime has been at the center of two critical stories in the past two weeks. In the first, federal agents shot and killed a man and quickly got to work justifying...

item.title: A tasty RPG that will make you very hungry
item.description: Roleplaying games are often defined by excess. Storylines that span dozens of hours, side quests so big they could be their own game, massive worlds that require complex maps to explore, and casts...

item.title: The perfect kit for all your tiny repairs
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 135, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, crank the AC, and also you can read all the old editions at the...

item.title: Are you filthy enough for a $700 portable shower?
item.description: Hot showers, like electricity, are a luxury that's easy to take for granted. That all changes after a few nights camping at a music festival, a week toiling at a backcountry job site, or...

item.title: Critical Zimbra Flaw Could Let Crafted Emails Run Malicious Code in User Sessions
item.description: Zimbra is urging customers to apply updates to address a critical security vulnerability impacting the Classic Web Client that could result in arbitrary code execution. The vulnerability has been...

item.title: OpenAI’s Head of Safety Is Leaving the Company
item.description: Johannes Heidecke’s departure comes as OpenAI tries to further integrate its research and safety teams.

item.title: No, Flock isn’t threatening people for debating surveillance
item.description: On Thursday, the Instagram account for a lecture series in Newport Beach, CA posted a photo of what appeared to be a cease and desist letter from the surveillance technology company Flock Safety....

item.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
item.description: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the...

item.title: Friday Squid Blogging: “Squidbleed” Vulnerability
item.description: In a rare combined cybersecurity/squid post, a twenty-nine-year-old squid proxy bug can leak HTTP requests. As usual, you can also use this squid post to talk about the security stories in the...

item.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
item.description: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

item.title: Apple Is Suing OpenAI for Allegedly Stealing Hardware Secrets
item.description: The iPhone maker claims OpenAI encouraged poached employees to bring over confidential presentations, secret prototypes, and key supplier details.

item.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
item.description: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open...
